---
title: "Research"
---

### Publications

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** (2021). *Las brechas electorales generacional y urbano-rural en el voto a Vox.* In Oliván Navarro, F. (Eds.), [El toro por los cuernos: Vox, la extrema derecha europea y el voto obrero.](https://www.tecnos.es/libro/semilla-y-surco/el-toro-por-los-cuernos-vox-la-extrema-derecha-europea-y-el-voto-obrero-fidel-olivan-navarro-9788430981212/) Tecnos.

### Working Projects

-   From Early to Late Supporters: Education, Social Networks and the Emergence of New Political Parties **\[Under Review\]**

-   Mobility, Reference Group Change, and the Spread of Political Norms: How Summer Holidays normalize the Radical Right in Spain (with [Vicente Valentim](https://www.vicentevalentim.com))

-   Economic Insecurity and Far Right Support: Social Relationships as Buffers or Catalysts (with [Jona De Jong](https://jonadejong.wordpress.com))

-   Local Female Political Representation and the Gender Gap in Voting for the Greens (with [Ingvild Zinober](https://www.eui.eu/people?id=ingvild-zinober))

-   No rain in sight - The electoral effect of water restrictions in France (with [Nina Lopez-Uroz](https://me.eui.eu/nina-lopez-uroz/) & [Rens Chazottes](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=hxKSQHoAAAAJ&hl=fr))

-   The Electoral Consequences of Immigrants Enfranchisement (with [Simon Hix](https://simonhix.com))
